Who I am

About Me

I am a highly motivated final-year student in the Industrial Engineering program at Sebelas Maret University, with a strong passion for Supply Chain Management, Work System Design, and Ergonomics.

Throughout my academic journey, I have gained hands-on experience across procurement, inventory control, and production planning through internships in both construction and manufacturing industries. I've worked with ERP systems to monitor material flow and analyze supply discrepancies, reducing lead time by up to 66%.

Known as an adaptable person with high initiative, I thrive in collaborative environments and am always seeking to grow through challenging experiences and meaningful projects.

Location Surakarta, Indonesia
University Sebelas Maret University
Major Industrial Engineering
GPA 3.55 / 4.00
Languages Indonesian (Native) · English
Interests Supply Chain, HSSE, Ergonomics

Portfolio of Work

Practicum Module — PPTI 1

Developed and authored the Practicum Module for Perancangan Teknik Industri 1 (PPTI 1) at the Work System Design & Ergonomics Laboratory. Covers time study, ergonomic assessment methods, and industrial engineering design principles aligned with current curriculum standards.
